---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for EduStream
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem this solves
A clear description of what problem or limitation this addresses.
Example: "I find it frustrating when..."

## Proposed solution
A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered
Other approaches you've thought about and why you ruled them out.

## Additional context
Mockups, links to similar features elsewhere, or any other context.
